title: Ubiquiti UniFi Protect ViewPort, UP-Viewport
category: Cameras, security / IP NVR Recorders / UniFi Video
description: The UniFi Protect ViewPort allows you to view your UniFi Protect camera feeds on an HDMI display . It uses Power over Ethernet and connects to the local network hosting your cameras and connects via HDMI to a display. The UniFi Protect ViewPort offers 4K video output at 30 frames per second. Protect systems can be viewed in custom high-density camera matrix configurations Display up to 16 IP cameras simultaneously View Unifi Protect cameras on an HDMI display Easy setup with UniFi Protect System Powered by 802.3af PoE HDMI video output up to 4K @ 30 fps Device Plastic holder HDMI cable 1m Screws
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces HDMI interface (resolution) [pixels] 3840 x 2160 LAN speed (2) 10/100/1000Mbps HDMI interface Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af Power type PoE Max. power consumption [W] 9,5
